又係一種得閒冇事就會姦鳩人地嘅生物
Sea otters出咗名會強姦baby seal

而且班友好撚擦得
每日可以食自身體重25%嘅食物 勁過啲死肥閪
唔夠野食的話Male sea otters會脅持BB sea otters嚟迫個老母畀啲食物出嚟

順帶一提佢地好撚興SM
姦鳩baby seal/ female sea otters嗰陣會撳佢地個頭落水
一姦可以姦超過個半鐘
基本上係一定會整死隻baby seal 而且超過10%嘅female sea otters都因為咁而死
有啲見隻野死咗就let it go
有啲就本住死屍都係肉 好過去自漬嘅心態
連死咗成個星期 已經爛緊嘅屍都唔放過

replies.msg:
Your cat will reduce your risk of heart attack....

The Power of Purr

https://www.mcall.com/health/mc-inspire-health-the-power-of-purr-story.html

Cats are not just cute and furry companions, they can also be good for your health. According to the Humane Society of the United States, 62 percent of American households own at least one pet, and a little less than half of those households own at least one cat. In appreciation, your feline friend offers these benefits:

A study by the University of Minnesota found that cat owners are 30 percent less likely to die from a heart attack, and their chances of dying of cardiovascular disease go down as well.

Scientists have found that cat ownership can cut stroke risk by one third.

Scientific American states that a cat's purr reduces stress levels and lowers blood pressure. It also says that the frequency of a cat's purr, between 25 and 150 Hertz, can facilitate bone density and healing.

A growing number of studies show that the love and positive feelings you have for your cat can give your immune system a boost.

[More Health] Pennsylvania coronavirus update: Nearly 10,000 new cases reported Saturday »
Further, numerous studies have found that playing and cuddling with your cat and the unconditional love they provide improve mood and can help relieve depression.

A State University of New York at Buffalo study found that cat lovers are more likely to have lower blood pressure, reduced heart rate and less anxiety. It is thought that stroking a cat cuts stress related hormones in the blood.

A Canadian study reported in Psychology Today states that owning a cat can lower your cholesterol just as effectively as medication.

A three year study at the Baker Medical Research Institute in Melbourne, Australia has shown that owning a cat can lower triglycerides.

[More Health] Pa. coronavirus cases and deaths: Track them here. »
Time reported on a French study that stated that autistic children benefit emotionally and socially when they have a family cat.

Cats can help children with other developmental disorders as well, especially with communication.

The journal Pediatrics reports researchers have found if you have a cat, your newborn is less likely to develop asthma and will have a greater immunity to allergies.

Studies have shown nursing homes that allow therapy cats have lower medication costs than facilities without cats.

A German study found if you own a cat, you don't go to the doctor as often or have as many hospital visits, perhaps for all the reasons stated above.

One last benefit: Adopt a homeless animal from your local shelter, and not only will you save a life, but you'll feel pretty good, too.

replies.msg:
我係用呢個app去save wts sticker, 首先down咗呢個app先


然後用google drive開返絲打俾嗰條link，應該會出到呢個畫面
㩒右上角嗰三點


然後再㩒「選擇開啟應用程式」，揀返用第一張相嗰個app去開就OK



跟住成組sticker就會save咗落個app入面，最右手邊嗰個「+」就係for save返落去wts度
